# VidInsight — YouTube Comment Analysis System

VidInsight is an AI-powered platform designed for YouTubers and marketing agencies to transform thousands of video comments into actionable data insights.

## Core Capabilities
- **Sentiment Analysis**: Automatically detects the emotional tone (positive, negative, neutral) of comments.
- **Moderation Tools**: Intelligent filtering of hidden or disguised swear words and insults.
- **Engagement Insights**: Automatically extracts common questions, suggestions, and criticisms from viewers.
- **Reporting**: Generates professional multi-sheet Excel (.xlsx) reports for deep-dive analysis.

## Key Links
- [Home Page](https://vid-insight.com/) — Overview of features and benefits.
- [Pricing](https://vid-insight.com/pricing.md) — Detailed breakdown of plans and credits.
- [Blog](https://vid-insight.com/blog) — Insights on YouTube growth and audience engagement.
- [Privacy Policy](https://vid-insight.com/gizlilik-politikasi) — Data protection and usage terms.

## Technical Context
- **API**: Uses YouTube Data API v3 for comment retrieval.
- **AI Models**: Leveraging advanced LLMs for linguistic analysis and classification.
- **Format**: Reports are delivered in browser-viewable dashboards and downloadable Excel files.

## Target Audience
- **Creators**: Looking to understand their audience and find new video ideas.
- **Brands**: Managing online reputation and customer feedback on YouTube.
- **Agencies**: Providing social media management and reporting for clients.

---
*This file provides context for LLMs and AI systems. See https://llmstxt.org for more information.*
